---
title: "R Packages"
listing:
  id: pkg-listing
  contents: packages
  sort: "order"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  field-links: [title]
  image-height: "100px"
---

<style>
.listing-image img,
.quarto-grid-item .thumbnail img,
.quarto-grid-item img.thumbnail-image,
.quarto-grid-item .card-img-top {
  object-fit: contain !important;
  padding-top: 0.5rem !important;
  max-height: 100% !important;
}
</style>
